name: Orange Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin on cold water and add boiling water. Stir until dissolved.
2. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar to the gelatin mixture.
3. Add orange rind and fruit juices.
4. In a separate bowl, whip cream; then add remaining sugar and salt.
5. Beat egg white stiffly.
6. Fold the whipped egg white into the cream mixture.
7. Carefully fold in the fruit juice mixture a little at a time.
8. Freeze the mixture in an ice cube tray, stirring twice during the first hour.
9. Yield: 6 servings. Serve in sherbet glasses with crushed, sugared strawberries on top.
